title: The AI Skill I use to prevent refactors
summary: JavaScript Mastery discusses an AI-based skill or technique used to prevent refactoring work in software development. The video presents a methodological perspective on applying AI to reduce refactoring overhead.
writeup: JavaScript Mastery presents an AI-based technique aimed at reducing refactoring work in software development. The video frames the approach as a methodology for applying AI to lower refactoring overhead, drawing on code refactoring practices and Git workflow. The takeaway is a process-oriented way to head off refactors rather than absorb them after the fact.
